name: I-Aspirin (i-Acetylsalicylic Acid)
description: I-non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) eneempawu ze-antiplatelet. Unyango lodidi lokuqala lwe-syndrome ekrokrelekayo ye-coronary syndrome (ACS). Ngokungaguqulekiyo inqanda ukudityaniswa kweplatelet -- isiphumo sihlala kubomi beplatelet (iintsuku ezisi-7-10).
indications: Ukrokrela ukuba yi-acute myocardial infarction (MI) -- hlafuna ngoko nangoko
dose: I-ACS: 325 mg PO -- HLAFUNA (ungaginyi ngokupheleleyo) ngoko nangoko. I-Analgesic / antipyretic: 325-650 mg PO q4-6h PRN.
window: ACS: Nika kwangethuba -- hlafuna ngoko nangoko xa urhanela.
contraindications: Ukopha kakhulu okungalawulekiyo -- i-aspirin yenza ukopha kube mandundu
warnings: MUSA ukunika izigulana ezophayo -- iaspirin iyonakalisa ngokungenakulungiseka ukusebenza kweplatelet kwaye yenza ukopha kube mandundu.
UNGAniki abantwana abangaphantsi kweminyaka eyi-12 abanesifo sentsholongwane -- ingozi yeReye's syndrome.
Ukucaphuka kwe-GI -- thatha kunye nokutya ukuba akuphumi.

pediatric.dose: I-Analgesic / antipyretic: 10-15 mg / kg PO q4-6h (ubuninzi be-650 mg / idosi). QAPHELA: I-Contraindicated kwisifo sentsholongwane (i-Reye syndrome).
pediatric.note: Sebenzisa i-acetaminophen (paracetamol) kwifiva kubantwana abanesifo sentsholongwane endaweni yoko.

obstetric.note: Kuphephe ukukhulelwa ingakumbi kwi-trimester yesithathu (ukuvalwa kwangaphambili kwe-ductus arteriosus). I-dose ephantsi (81mg) isetyenziselwa ukukhusela i-pre-eclampsia phantsi kolawulo lukagqirha kuphela.
